sqlMap.select: SELECT B.theme_id AS themeid, B.theme_name AS themename, B.theme_content AS themecontent, A.theme_used AS themeused, A.theme_default AS themedefault FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME_COMP A JOIN TBL_PORTAL_THEME B ON A.theme_id = B.theme_id WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND A.company_id = #companyId# AND A.theme_id = #themeId#

SELECT B.theme_id AS theme_id, B.frame_id AS framid, B.frame_name AS framename, A.frame_used AS frameused, A.frame_default AS framedefault FROM TBL_PORTAL_FRAME_COMP A JOIN TBL_PORTAL_FRAME B ON A.theme_id = B.theme_id AND A.frame_id = B.frame_id WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND A.company_id = #companyId# AND A.theme_id = #themeId#

SELECT A.menu_id AS menuid, C.menu_name AS menuname, A.menu_used AS menuused, A.company_lang AS companylang, B.menu_url AS menuurl, B.icon_url AS iconurl, CASE WHEN A.company_order IS NULL THEN B.default_order ELSE A.company_order END AS defaultorder FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU_COMP A JOIN TBL_PORTAL_MENU B ON A.menu_id = B.menu_id JOIN TBL_PORTAL_MENU_NAME C ON A.tenant_id = C.tenant_id AND A.company_id = C.company_id AND A.menu_id = C.menu_id AND A.company_lang = C.menu_lang WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND A.company_id = #companyId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_THEME_COMP SET theme_used = #themeUsed#, theme_default = #themeDefault# WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND theme_id = #themeId#
UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_FRAME_COMP SET frame_used = #frameUsed#, frame_default = #frameDefault# WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND theme_id = #themeId# AND frame_id = #frameId#
